metadata.description: A Claude AI skill that guides an AI coding agent through a complete, production-quality migration from Laravel Nova to Filament PHP v5.

plugins.name: laravel-nova-to-filament
plugins.description: Perform a complete, production-quality migration from Laravel Nova to Filament PHP v5. Covers field mapping, resources, actions, filters, lenses, metrics, dashboards, authorization, navigation, and testing with idiomatic Filament v5 patterns.
